reviewInfo: Please review the information below and provide your signature.
videoAck: I have watched and understood the educational video
ackMaterials: I have reviewed all the consent materials and understand the information provided.
ackAgreement: I voluntarily agree to the procedure/treatment described and understand the risks, benefits, and alternatives.
signatureLabel: Type your full legal name as your signature
signatureLegal: By typing your name above, you acknowledge that this constitutes a legal signature.
expiredDesc: Please contact your healthcare provider for a new invitation.
errorDesc: Unable to load the consent form. Please try again.
successDesc: Your signed consent has been recorded. You can safely close this page.
createAccountDesc: Create an account to track your consents and manage your health records.
loginDesc: Sign in with your existing account to sign this consent.
completeProfileDesc: Please verify your information before signing.
